revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初八]][[zh:二月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 8|qq=February 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1695|en|1695|qid=Q7696|lt=1695|1=1695}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – A great fire occurred in Edo, with 64,000 households burned. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|qid=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}} {{ill|March 21|en|March 21|qid=Q2433|lt=March 21|1=March 21}}) – Due to sediment accumulation in the old Yodogawa (renamed Anji River), the Tokugawa shogunate issued an order for river dredging in several towns, and the dredged soil was used to create 【Tenpōzan】. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – The "Newspaper Publication Ordinance" was established, permitting the issuance of newspapers. == Births == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|qid=Q6680|lt=1574|1=1574}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}}) – {{ill|Yūki Hideyasu|en|Yūki Hideyasu|qid=Q1130929|lt=Yūki Hideyasu|1=Yūki Hideyasu}}<ref>{{Kotobank|結城秀康|qq=}}</ref>, a military commander and the second son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, later the first lord of the Fukui Domain (died {{ill|1607|en|1607|qid=Q6756|lt=1607|1=1607}}). * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1692|en|1692|qid=Q7685|lt=1692|1=1692}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsugutomo|en|Tokugawa Tsugutomo|qid=Q1052927|lt=Tokugawa Tsuguyasu|1=Tokugawa Tsugutomo}}, lord of the Owari Domain (died {{ill|1731|en|1731|qid=Q6963|lt=1731|1=1731}}). * [[Shōtoku (Japan)|Shōtoku]] 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}}) – {{ill|Itō Jakuchū|en|Itō Jakuchū|qid=Q1240575|lt=Itō Wakakyū|1=Itō Jakuchū}}, a painter of the Edo period (died {{ill|1800|en|1800|qid=Q6875|lt=1800|1=1800}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|qid=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku|1=Kōryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|215 BC|en|215 BC|qid=Q44835|lt=215 BC|1=215 BC}} {{ill|March 27|en|March 27|qid=Q2457|lt=March 27|1=March 27}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōrei|en|Emperor Kōrei|qid=Q313041|lt=Emperor Kōrei|1=Emperor Kōrei}}, the 7th Emperor of Japan. * {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1008|en|1008|qid=Q19235|lt=1008|1=1008}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kazan|en|Emperor Kazan|qid=Q361000|lt=Hanayama Tennō|1=Emperor Kazan}}, the 65th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|968|en|968|qid=Q23918|lt=968|1=968}}). * [[An'ei (era)|An'ei]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1776|en|1776|qid=Q7703|lt=1776|1=1776}} {{ill|March 27|en|March 27|qid=Q2457|lt=March 27|1=March 27}}) – {{ill|Ikeda Tsugumasa|en|Ikeda Tsugumasa|qid=Q28131624|lt=Ikeda Tsugumasa|1=Ikeda Tsugumasa}}, the 3rd lord of the Okayama Domain (born {{ill|1702|en|1702|qid=Q6819|lt=1702|1=1702}}). == Commemorations == * 針供養 * 御事始め – The traditional beginning-of-year ritual for starting agricultural and miscellaneous tasks.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|7|2|9|1|8|3|2|0208|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 8일]] [[ja:2月8日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初八]]
[[ar:February 8 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初八]] {{wikidata link|Q839343}} [[Category:Days 8 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
